comment_content:
i wont talk abt my own internship experience, as it reli vary among diff companies (i had a fun experience in my company tho)
this course requires student to submit the application form 2 weeks before your internship starts, which can be quite annoying. as ust end our spring sem late, you might have to submit it during exam period. if u dun submit ur application on time, you hv to send an email to seek for approval (like what i did, i got approved btw). and after internship you hv to submit an internship report and an evaluation report from your supervisor in ur intern
